thoughts: The user's goal is to add 'Healthcare Advances in 2024' as a personalized news topic. Currently, this text has been typed into the 'Search News Articles' input field at the top of the page. Furthermore, no button to 'add' or 'save' a topic has been clicked, and there is no indication that the topic has been successfully added to a personalized list. The user likely needs to navigate to the 'Personalized News' section via the 'Go To Personalized News' button to find the correct input field for adding topics.
